2023-24 Cal Poly Mustangs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 4-28 (0-20, 11th in Big West MBB)

Coach: John Smith

PS/G: 63.7 (354th of 362)

PA/G: 74.1 (250th of 362)

SRS: -13.64 (327th of 362)

SOS: -2.28 (186th of 362)

ORtg: 94.3 (353rd of 362)

DRtg: 109.7 (324th of 362)
